title: H & M 8 X 12.5 Premium Wreath Crackers
features: Box of 8 with eight matching place cards
Cracker 1 finish printed wreath design, white base and red satin ribbon
Cracker 2 finish printed wreath design, red base and red satin ribbon
description: This box of eight premium crackers with matching place cards, is a wonderful traditional choice for a classic christmas collection, featuring a striking wreath design on a white or red base and finished with red satin ribbon. Crackers contents include a hat, joke, snap and a special prize of a phone holder, phone stylus, photo frame, mini screwdriver set, bracelet, comb, shoehorn or nail clippers. Each box contains a sheet of eight place cards behind the cracker tray.
